negative_control.note: `scripts/replay_denials.py` replays denied steps with the current validator implementation; it does not bind replay to a specific frozen policy object unless policy/version metadata is carried alongside each denied step. Comparing recorded `policy_version` fields across artifacts detects accidental drift between the replay summary and the run manifest.

negative_control_allowlist_widening.note: Validator replay is tool-list-parameterized; widening the allow-list can admit previously-denied steps. This is a limitation unless denied-step records include an explicit policy fingerprint.
